subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in God and assured of His signs! The people of Zanjan, at the dawning of the Manifestation, were illumined by the effulgence of Sinai and the gleaming of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مومن بالله و موقن بایات الله اهالی زنجان در بدو ظهور از جلوه طور و لمعه
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement
